Government Degree College Nandasain
Admin Panel → Slider tab se photos upload karein
About Government Degree College Nandasain

Tucked into the folds of the Garhwal Himalayas near Nauti, Government Degree College Nandasain opened its doors in 2015 with a simple mission — bring a real degree college within walking distance of Chamoli's hill villages, instead of a bus ride away. For the first-generation learners and young women of this region, that shift changed what was possible. Today, affiliated to Sridev Suman Uttarakhand University and recognised by the UGC under Sections 2(f) & 12(B), the college holds a NAAC 'B+' accreditation and runs a three-year B.A. programme across six subjects, anchored by an active NSS unit, an annual sports meet, and a library that has quietly become the heart of student life here.

2015
Established
6
Subjects Offered
1
Faculty (Arts)
B+
NAAC Grade

🏛️
Principal
🟢 On Duty · Verified
💬 📞
From the Principal's Desk
🎙️ Principal ki awaaz choose karein:
Amar Chandra Vishwakarma
Dear Students, Parents, and Visitors, Welcome to Government Degree College, Nandasain, Chamoli. Nestled in the serene Himalayas, our institution is dedicated to making quality higher education accessible, empowering, and transformative for the youth of Uttarakhand. We believe true education goes beyond text-based learning. Our focus is to foster academic excellence, critical thinking, and strong moral character. Through a dedicated faculty, robust academic programs, and active co-curricular initiatives, we strive to nurture resilient individuals ready to face global challenges while remaining deeply rooted in community values. To our students: view this college as your launchpad. Approach your journey here with curiosity, discipline, and a passion to excel. Together with our faculty, parents, and the local community, we are committed to driving this institution toward new heights of excellence and contributing meaningfully to our nation's progress. I wish you all a deeply rewarding and successful academic experience. Our college continues to strengthen its academic offerings across Arts, Commerce, and Science streams, and every programme reflects our ongoing commitment to quality and accountability. We take great pride in our qualified and dedicated faculty, who go beyond the classroom to mentor students in research, competitive examinations, and career planning. Our library, laboratories, and digital learning resources are continually upgraded to keep pace with changing academic needs. Beyond academics, we actively encourage participation in NSS, NCC, sports, and cultural activities that build teamwork, leadership, and a sense of civic responsibility among our students. Special emphasis is placed on supporting first-generation learners and students from economically weaker backgrounds through scholarships and mentorship. We continue to strengthen industry linkages and skill-development initiatives so that our graduates are well prepared for both employment and higher studies. As an institution rooted in the Himalayan region, we remain committed to promoting environmental awareness and sustainable practices within our student community. Our administration works closely with the local community to ensure that this college remains a true centre of learning, culture, and social progress for the entire Nandasain area. We continuously welcome feedback from students, parents, and alumni to improve our academic and administrative processes further. Every achievement of our students, whether academic, cultural, or in sports, remains a matter of great pride for this institution. I encourage each and every student to make full use of the opportunities available here, and to pursue their education with sincerity, patience, and determination.
Amar Chandra Vishwakarma
🎯 Our Purpose
Mission & Vision
🎯
Our Mission
Chamoli के पर्वतीय क्षेत्र के छात्र-छात्राओं को गुणवत्तापूर्ण, समावेशी एवं सुलभ उच्च शिक्षा प्रदान करना, उनमें राष्ट्रीय मूल्यों, सांस्कृतिक चेतना, वैज्ञानिक दृष्टिकोण और व्यावसायिक दक्षता का समावेश करते हुए उन्हें एक सक्षम, आत्मनिर्भर एवं जिम्मेदार नागरिक बनाना। महाविद्यालय शिक्षण के साथ-साथ चरित्र निर्माण, अनुसंधान एवं सामुदायिक सेवा को भी समान महत्व देता है, ताकि प्रत्येक छात्र अपने गांव, समाज एवं राष्ट्र के विकास में सार्थक योगदान दे सके।
🔭
Our Vision
एक ऐसे महाविद्यालय का निर्माण करना जो Uttarakhand के उच्च शिक्षा क्षेत्र में उत्कृष्टता, समावेशिता और नवाचार का केंद्र बने तथा छात्रों को वैश्विक चुनौतियों के लिए तैयार करे। हमारा प्रयास है कि यह संस्थान गुणवत्तापूर्ण शिक्षण, अनुसंधान एवं कौशल विकास के माध्यम से पर्वतीय क्षेत्र के युवाओं को राष्ट्रीय एवं अंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तर पर प्रतिस्पर्धी बनाए, तथा एक ऐसा शैक्षणिक वातावरण सृजित करे जहाँ हर छात्र अपनी पूर्ण क्षमता को पहचान कर समाज के लिए एक प्रेरणास्रोत बन सके।
🌟 Our Core Values
🎓

🤝

🧭

📋 How to Apply
Admission Process & Eligibility
⏰ Deadline
Admission for the session 2026-2027 → 🟢 Start: 17/07/2026 🔴 Last Date: 31/07/2026 Admission for the session 2026-2027 → 🟢 Start: 17/07/2026 🔴 Last Date: 31/07/2026
1
पात्रता जाँचें
UG (BA/BSc/BCom) के लिए किसी मान्यता प्राप्त बोर्ड से 12वीं उत्तीर्ण अनिवार्य है। PG (MA/MSc/MCom) के लिए संबंधित विषय में Graduation आवश्यक है। Arts, Science और Commerce — सभी stream के छात्र आवेदन कर सकते हैं।
2
Samarth Portal पर Registration करें
Uttarakhand Samarth Admission Portal पर जाकर Registration करें और Online Admission Form भरें। 2026-27 के लिए: 10 July – 31 July 2026। 🔗 ukadmission.samarth.ac.in
3
Documents Online Upload करें
Samarth Portal पर ही सभी आवश्यक दस्तावेज़ Upload करें — 10वीं/12वीं Marksheet, Aadhar Card, Passport Photo, Category Certificate (यदि लागू), Migration Certificate (यदि लागू)।
4
Fees Online जमा करें
Admission Fees का भुगतान Samarth Portal पर Online करें। SC/ST/OBC छात्रों के लिए Scholarship के तहत Fees में छूट उपलब्ध है।
5
Printout लेकर College आएं
Samarth Portal से भरे हुए Admission Form का Printout निकालें और सभी Original Documents तथा उनकी Photocopies के साथ College में जमा करें।
6
Samarth Nodal Officer Verification
College में नियुक्त Samarth Nodal Officer आपके सभी Original Documents का सत्यापन करेगा और Samarth Portal पर Verify करेगा।
7
Admission Confirmed ✅
Nodal Verification के बाद आपका Admission Confirm हो जाएगा। Samarth Portal से Admission Confirmation Letter Download करें।

📋 Eligibility Criteria — UG/PG Programmes

  • UG (BA/BSc/BCom): किसी मान्यता प्राप्त बोर्ड से 12वीं उत्तीर्ण (किसी भी Stream)
  • PG (MA/MSc/MCom): संबंधित विषय में Graduation उत्तीर्ण
  • Minimum 33% marks (General), SC/ST के लिए Pass Marks
  • Age Limit: 17 से 25 वर्ष (Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC नियमानुसार)
  • Uttarakhand domicile को प्राथमिकता (State Govt. नियमानुसार)

About
प्रवेश समिति महाविद्यालय में पारदर्शी एवं नियमानुसार प्रवेश प्रक्रिया सुनिश्चित करने हेतु उत्तरदायी है। प्रवेश संबंधी किसी भी जानकारी या सहायता हेतु नीचे दिए गए सदस्यों से संपर्क करें।

Professional Development
Faculty Resources & Schemes
📖 Faculty Development Programme (FDP)

Teachers can avail study leave and Teacher Fellowship to pursue M.Phil/Ph.D, with provision for appointing a Substitute Teacher during the fellowship period. Application is routed through the college/university to UGC.

🎓 Refresher Courses & Faculty Induction Programme (MMTTP)

3–4 week training programmes conducted by UGC-Malaviya Mission Teacher Training Centres (formerly HRDCs), required for Career Advancement Scheme (CAS) promotion. Register directly on the official UGC portal below.

🔗 Register on MMTTP (UGC Portal) 📍 Nearest Centre: Kumaun University, Nainital
✈️ Conference/Seminar Participation Grant (PTAC)

Reimbursement of travel and registration fee for attending academic conferences, workshops, and seminars in India. Application is submitted through the Principal to UGC — no separate online portal.

📚 Knowledge Resource Centre
College Library
📚 Knowledge Resource Centre
GDC Nandasain Library
📚 Welcome To The College Library
📚
Welcome to GDC Nandasain Library
📖 Read About Our Library ▾

The Library of Government Degree College, Nandasain (Chamoli), is a vibrant learning ecosystem where traditional scholarship meets modern technological innovation. Designed to support the academic aspirations of our students, the library serves as a gateway to both physical resources and global digital repositories, breaking geographical barriers to deliver world-class education.

Classification Scheme
DDC
Cataloguing
AACR-2
Automation
E-Granthalay 4.0
👤
Diksha Kimothi
Assistant Librarian
📚 May I help you with Library Circulation Services?📚 May I help you with Library Circulation Services?
5000+
Total Books
📖
Journals & E-Books
🌐
Digital Access
🔗 Digital Library Access 🎓 SWAYAM Courses (Free Online Learning)
ℹ️ SWAYAM ke baare mein ▾

Govt. of India ka free online course platform — school se postgraduate tak UGC-approved courses, bina kisi fees ke, credit transfer ke saath.

📚 Free Coaching Scheme (SC/OBC) — UPSC/JEE/NEET
ℹ️ Coaching Scheme ke baare mein ▾

SC/OBC students ke liye UPSC, JEE, NEET, Banking exams ki free coaching + ₹4000/month stipend (family income ≤₹8 lakh/year).

📜 Library Rules & Regulations ▾
  • 🪪ID-Card Mandatory: College Library card is compulsory for book issue and entry.
  • 📚Issue Limit: Students can borrow up to 2 books at a time.
  • 📅Return Duration: Books must be returned or renewed within 14 days.
  • 💰Late Fine: A fine of ₹1 per day will be charged after the due date.
  • 🤫Discipline: Perfect silence and mobile phones on silent mode are strictly required.

📝 OBE Feedback Module
Outcome Based Education Feedback

All students, parents, and teachers are informed that, in accordance with the directions of the Uttarakhand Government, an Outcome Based Education (OBE) feedback module is being effectively implemented under the National Education Policy 2020. Please make sure to submit your feedback using the buttons below.

📋 College Prospectus

🙏 Welcome — A Message from the Principal
🏛️

It gives me immense pleasure to welcome you to Government Degree College Nandasain — a growing centre of higher education serving the youth of the Chamoli hill region.

Amar Chandra Vishwakarma
Principal
About the College

Government Degree College Nandasain is a premier institution of higher education located in Nandasain, Nauti, in the Chamoli district of Uttarakhand. Affiliated to Sridev Suman University and recognised by the UGC under Sections 2(f) & 12B, the college has been accredited 'B+' by NAAC, reflecting its commitment to quality teaching and governance for students of the hill region.

🎯 Mission

🔭 Vision

⭐ Why GDC Nandasain
  • Focused Arts-stream education across six well-established subjects
  • NAAC Accredited 'B+' and UGC recognised under Sections 2(f) & 12B
  • Affiliated to Sridev Suman University, Badshahithaul, Tehri Garhwal
  • Fully online, transparent admission via the Uttarakhand Samarth Portal
  • Active NSS unit, sports program and student welfare committees
  • Affordable government fee structure with SC/ST/OBC scholarship support
  • A growing campus library and digital resource access

📋 Admission Process
Eligibility

Minimum 40% marks in Intermediate (12th) examination; 5% relaxation for SC/ST candidates as per applicable norms.

Reservation

SC 19% · ST 4% · OBC 14% · EWS 10% — as per Uttarakhand government norms, for state residents, on production of valid certificates.

💰 Fee & Scholarships

No deserving student should be kept from education by cost — support is available for those who qualify. SC/ST/OBC students receive fee concessions under applicable scholarship schemes, processed through the Samarth Portal.

🏛️ About The College
Institutional Profile
About The College
🏛️
Government Degree College, Nandasain — Chamoli, Uttarakhand
🎓 WELCOME
Welcome To Government Degree College Nandasain • Excellence in Education • Building Leaders of Tomorrow • Welcome To Government Degree College Nandasain • Excellence in Education • Building Leaders of Tomorrow •
🏛️ College Introduction

Government Degree College, Nandasain was established in the year 2015 under the aegis of the Department of Higher Education, Government of Uttarakhand, with the singular purpose of bringing accessible and affordable higher education to the youth of the remote Himalayan hill region. Situated in the village of Nandasain, near Nauti, in the Adibadri tehsil of Chamoli district, the college occupies a serene setting amid the Garhwal Himalayas, at approximately 30.0539° North latitude and 79.2865° East longitude, at an elevation that places it firmly within the mid-Himalayan belt overlooking the Alaknanda valley.

Before the college was established, students from Nandasain, Nauti, and the surrounding villages had to travel long distances, often several hours by bus, to reach the nearest degree college. The founding of GDC Nandasain changed that reality, allowing hundreds of first-generation learners, particularly young women from the hill villages, to pursue a Bachelor's degree without leaving their home region. In this sense, the college is as much a social institution as an academic one, anchoring the aspirations of an entire community of hill villages within a short and manageable distance.

The college is affiliated to Sridev Suman Uttarakhand University, Badshahithaul, Tehri Garhwal, and is recognised by the University Grants Commission under Sections 2(f) and 12(B). It has been accredited Grade 'B+' by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council, a reflection of its steady progress in teaching quality, governance, and student support since inception. The Faculty of Arts currently offers a three-year Bachelor of Arts programme across six well-established subjects — Hindi, English, Sanskrit, Political Science, Economics, and Sociology — taught by a dedicated faculty committed to both classroom instruction and the personal growth of their students.

Beyond the classroom, the college has built an active co-curricular ecosystem — a National Service Scheme unit engaged in community outreach, an Annual Sports Program that draws students from across the region, and a growing library that serves as a quiet refuge for exam preparation and independent study. As Chamoli continues to develop, GDC Nandasain aims to expand its academic offerings, strengthen its infrastructure, and deepen its role as a centre of opportunity, discipline, and hope for the youth of this Himalayan hill region — true to its vision of building inclusive, quality higher education rooted in local community values.

🧭 Our Vision

To expand academic offerings, strengthen infrastructure, and deepen the college's role as a centre of opportunity, discipline, and hope for the youth of this Himalayan hill region — true to a vision of building inclusive, quality higher education rooted in local community values.

🎯 Our Mission
  • To provide accessible, affordable, and quality higher education to the youth of the Nandasain-Nauti hill region, with particular focus on first-generation learners and young women.
  • To foster academic excellence, discipline, and character-building alongside curricular and co-curricular growth.
  • To strengthen institutional infrastructure and faculty capability in step with the aspirations of the local community.
  • To instil civic responsibility and social awareness among students through NSS, sports, and community outreach activities.
🏔️ Institutional Distinctiveness

Government Degree College, Nandasain holds the distinction of being the first and only degree college serving Nandasain, Nauti, and the surrounding hill villages of the Adibadri tehsil, Chamoli district. Before its establishment in 2015, students from this cluster of Himalayan hill villages had no access to higher education without travelling several hours to the nearest town. The college's identity is thus inseparable from its role as a social anchor for an entire hill community — enabling first-generation learners, and especially young women, to pursue a Bachelor's degree close to home.

🌱 Best Practices
Best Practice 1 — Community-Rooted Access to Education

The college actively works to remove geographic and economic barriers to higher education for hill-village students, particularly young women, through local accessibility, SC/ST/OBC fee concessions, and close engagement with the surrounding community.

Best Practice 2 — Holistic Student Development

Beyond academics, the college nurtures civic and personal development through its NSS unit, annual sports program, and library resources, encouraging discipline, teamwork, and social responsibility among students.

📊 SWOC Analysis
💪 Strengths
  • Only degree college in the region
  • NAAC 'B+' accredited
  • Affordable government fee structure
⚠️ Weaknesses
  • Limited to Arts stream only, at present
  • Small campus infrastructure still developing
  • Limited faculty strength for a growing student base
🚀 Opportunities
  • Scope to introduce Science & Commerce streams
  • Growth in enrolment from a wide catchment of hill villages
  • Potential for skill-development & vocational tie-ups
⛰️ Challenges
  • Difficult hill terrain & seasonal connectivity
  • Limited local employment avenues for graduates
  • Resource constraints typical of remote government colleges

A formal Placement Cell is currently being established. In the meantime, students receive career and higher-education guidance from faculty mentors, including support for competitive examinations and further studies.

🤝 MoUs & Collaborations

The college does not currently hold any formal MoUs with universities, NGOs, or industry partners. This section will be updated as institutional collaborations are established.

🕰️ College Timeline
2015
Government Degree College, Nandasain established under the Department of Higher Education, Government of Uttarakhand.
2022
College accredited Grade 'B+' by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC).
2026
Continued growth in enrolment, digital infrastructure, and student support systems.
Additional milestones to be added by the college administration as records are compiled.
❓ Frequently Asked Questions
How do I apply for admission?

Admissions are conducted fully online through the Uttarakhand Samarth Admission Portal. See the Admission Process section for step-by-step details.

What is the fee structure?

The college follows an affordable government fee structure, with concessions available for SC/ST/OBC students under applicable scholarship schemes. See the Fee & Scholarships section for details.

Is hostel accommodation available?

The college does not currently have a hostel facility. Most students commute daily from Nandasain, Nauti, and neighbouring hill villages.

Which courses are currently offered?

Currently, only the B.A. (Bachelor of Arts) programme is sanctioned, offered across six subjects. B.Sc., B.Com., and postgraduate programmes are not sanctioned at present.

✨ Why Choose GDC Nandasain
🏔️The first and only degree college serving Nandasain, Nauti, and the surrounding hill villages of Chamoli district.
👩‍🎓Focused on first-generation learners, particularly young women, who can now pursue a degree without leaving their home region.
🏅NAAC accredited, UGC recognised under 2(f) & 12(B), and affiliated to Sridev Suman Uttarakhand University.
🤝A community-rooted institution — as much a social anchor for the hill villages as an academic one.
🗺️ How to Reach Us
The college is located in the village of Nandasain, near Nauti, in the Adibadri tehsil of Chamoli district, Uttarakhand — overlooking the Alaknanda valley in the Garhwal Himalayas. It is accessible by road from Karnaprayag and Nauti via regular local bus and shared-taxi services.

      🚫 Anti-Ragging
      Anti-Ragging Committee & Helpline
      About
      रैगिंग एक दंडनीय अपराध है। UGC विनियम 2009 के अंतर्गत महाविद्यालय में रैगिंग पूर्णतः प्रतिबंधित है। किसी भी छात्र/छात्रा के साथ रैगिंग की घटना होने पर तुरंत नीचे दिए गए हेल्पलाइन नंबर पर सूचित करें या शिकायत फॉर्म भरें। शिकायतकर्ता की पहचान पूर्णतः गोपनीय रखी जाएगी।
      UGC Online Undertaking Portal
      प्रत्येक छात्र/छात्रा एवं अभिभावक को UGC की आधिकारिक Anti-Ragging वेबसाइट पर ऑनलाइन अंडरटेकिंग (Undertaking) भरना अनिवार्य है। नीचे दिए गए बटन पर क्लिक करें, "College" चुनें और फॉर्म भरें।
      📝 Fill Online Anti-Ragging Undertaking
      Official Site: antiragging.in · UGC & Ministry of Education Initiative
      National Helpline
      📞 1800-180-5522
      UGC Anti-Ragging Helpline · Toll Free · 24×7
      समिति के सदस्य / Committee Members
      Admin panel से सदस्य जोड़ें।
      📝 Ragging Complaint Form
      ✅ आपकी शिकायत दर्ज हो गई। College प्रशासन शीघ्र संपर्क करेगा।
      👩 Women Cell
      Women Cell Support & Empowerment
      About
      महाविद्यालय की Women Cell छात्राओं एवं महिला स्टाफ की सुरक्षा, सम्मान एवं समान अवसर सुनिश्चित करने हेतु कार्यरत है। यह प्रकोष्ठ परामर्श, जागरूकता कार्यक्रम एवं किसी भी प्रकार की शिकायत के त्वरित एवं गोपनीय समाधान हेतु सदैव उपलब्ध है।
      Contact / Helpline
      📞 181
      Women Helpline (National) · Toll Free · 24×7
      समिति के सदस्य / Committee Members
      Admin panel से सदस्य जोड़ें।
      📝 Women Cell Complaint / Assistance Form
      ✅ आपकी जानकारी दर्ज हो गई। Women Cell शीघ्र संपर्क करेगी।
      ⚖️ POSH Committee
      Prevention of Sexual Harassment (POSH) Committee
      About
      यौन उत्पीड़न रोकथाम (POSH Act, 2013) के अंतर्गत गठित आंतरिक शिकायत समिति (ICC) महाविद्यालय परिसर में सभी छात्राओं एवं महिला कर्मचारियों हेतु सुरक्षित एवं सम्मानजनक वातावरण सुनिश्चित करने हेतु कार्यरत है। किसी भी प्रकार की शिकायत पूर्णतः गोपनीय रखी जाती है।
      ICC Contact
      📞 College Office
      Internal Complaints Committee (ICC)
      समिति के सदस्य / ICC Members
      Admin panel से सदस्य जोड़ें।
      📝 POSH Complaint Form
      ✅ आपकी शिकायत दर्ज हो गई। ICC शीघ्र संपर्क करेगी।
      💬 Grievance / Feedback
      Feedback & Grievance Form
      ✅ आपकी Feedback सफलतापूर्वक प्राप्त हुई। College 3 कार्यदिवसों में संपर्क करेगा।

      RTI Act 2005 के अंतर्गत आवेदन College Office में जमा करें।
      आवेदन शुल्क₹10 (Postal Order / DD)
      निर्धारित अवधि30 दिन

      ⚙️
      Admin Panel
      GDC Nandasain — Full Control
      🔐
      Admin Password dalkar login karein
      ❌ Galat password. Dobara try karein.
      👆 Upar se ek tab chunein
      📝 All Site Text — Search & Edit
      Nav, menu, footer aur baaki chhoti chhoti hardcoded text yahan se edit karo. Type karke search karo, edit karo — apne aap save ho jayega.
      👨‍💼 Principal Message
      ✍️ Ye naam message card ke andar cursive signature mein bhi automatically dikhta hai — alag se edit karne ki zaroorat nahi.
      📞 Ye number Principal card ke call button (☎) se seedha dial hoga.
      🖼️
      Tap karke Principal ki photo select karein
      ✅ Principal info saved!
      🏛️ Principal's Tenure (Institutional Legacy Table)
      Har record ek row banata hai website ke "Principal's Tenure" table mein. 6 se zyada records honge toh table apne aap scroll ho jayegi.
      ✅ Tenure table updated!
      ✅ Principal section reset! Naye Principal ki details bharein.
      🏛️ College Identity — Master Control
      Yahan info bharo aur ek hi Save button se poori website pe — title, hero, badges, NAAC section, RTI, Contact, Map aur Footer — har jagah update ho jayega. Cloud pe bhi auto-save hota hai.
      COLLEGE FULL NAME
      SHORT NAME
      VILLAGE / ADDRESS LINE
      ZILA (DISTRICT)
      STATE
      PIN CODE
      ESTABLISHED YEAR
      AFFILIATION NUMBER
      FOOTER COPYRIGHT YEAR (khali chhodein = auto current year)
      UNIVERSITY NAME (Affiliated To)
      UNIVERSITY PLACE
      UGC RECOGNITION
      COLLEGE EMAIL
      OFFICE PHONE
      PROGRAMS LINE (hero banner)
      NAAC GRADE
      CGPA
      CYCLE
      ASSESS. YEAR
      NAAC ACCREDITED?
      🗂️ IQAC (Internal Quality Assurance Cell) Details
      IQAC COORDINATOR
      IQAC EMAIL
      IQAC MEETING SCHEDULE
      ✅ Poori website pe identity update ho gayi!
      ⚙️ Site Settings — Theme & Language
      Ye controls pehle header mein sabko dikhte the, ab yahan admin panel mein move kar diye gaye hain. Yahan se set karo, website apne aap us setting ko yaad rakhegi (sab visitors ke liye default).
      🎨 THEME (Default: Light)
      🌐 LANGUAGE (Default: Hindi)
      Sambandhta Kramank (Affiliation No.) aur NAAC Grade yahin se edit karein

      VIEW WING:
      ✅ Faculty updated successfully!
      Teen wings ke departments manage karein — icon aur naam edit, add, ya delete karein.
      ✅ Departments saved!
      Har department ki activity add karein — teacher, activity naam, students, date, 3 photos aur 1st/2nd/3rd position (agar ho) daal ke certificate bhi generate kar sakte hain.
      ➕ Nayi Activity Add Karein
      📤
      🏆 WINNERS (optional)

      ADDED ENTRIES

      Notice add/edit/delete karein — har notice apne category tab mein aur "All Notices" mein dikhega

        📢 Latest Updates
        Yahan se written updates add karein — jaise Admission start/last date, Exam start/last date, ya koi bhi program information. Maximum 6 updates add kar sakte hain, sabse naya update sabse upar dikhega.

        ✅ Contact info updated!
        📱 Social Media Links (khali chhodein jo nahi chahiye)
        ✅ Social links updated!
        💬 WhatsApp Chat Button
        Contact tab mein diya "Office Phone Number" hi WhatsApp button ke liye use hota hai. Number save karte hi visitor-facing floating WhatsApp button site pe apne aap dikhne lagega.
        Feedback Form — Category Options (एक line = ek option)
        Feedback Success Message
        Anti-Ragging Complaint Success Message
        ✅ Feedback settings updated!
        Website ki security status, visitor analytics aur Google Analytics setup — sab ek jagah.
        🔒 SSL / HTTPS Security
        Ye setting GitHub Pages ke domain settings se automatically control hoti hai — code se change nahi hoti. Jaise hi aapka custom domain (gdcnandasain.ac.in) ka DNS verify ho jata hai, GitHub khud hi free SSL certificate issue kar deta hai aur "Enforce HTTPS" checkbox apne aap available ho jata hai. Iske liye GitHub repo → Settings → Pages mein jaake check karein.
        📈 Google Analytics (GA4)
        analytics.google.com par free account banakar apni site ki GA4 Measurement ID (jaise G-XXXXXXXXXX) yahan paste karein — site automatically Google Analytics track karna shuru kar degi, koi code edit nahi karna padega.
        ✅ Google Analytics ID saved! Ab tracking shuru ho gayi hai.
        📊 Visitor Dashboard (Built-in)
        ⏳ Loading stats...
        Last 7 Days
        Note: Ye ek lightweight built-in visitor counter hai (session-based, approximate). Detailed insights (location, devices, traffic source, behavior flow) ke liye upar Google Analytics setup karna recommended hai.
        🗄️ Automated Database Backup
        Website jab bhi load hoti hai, us din ka backup automatically ban jata hai (agar pehle se na bana ho) — koi manual kaam nahi karna padta. Backups 30 din tak rakhe jate hain, usse purane apne aap hat jate hain. Har backup Excel/JSON file ke roop mein download bhi kiya ja sakta hai.
        ⏳ Loading backups...
        ✅ Backup ban gaya!
        Student Registration, Database, Search aur Document Management — sab ek jagah.
        ➕ New Student Registration
        ✅ Student registered!
        📋 Student Database 0
        Career Updates, Placement Drives, Recruiters aur Placement Gallery — sab yahan manage karein.
        📢 Career Updates
        🏢 Placement Drives
        🤝 Recruiters
        📸 Placement Gallery
        Student, Faculty aur Admission ke structured downloadable reports — sab ek jagah.
        🎓 Student Report
        Student Management module mein registered sabhi students ki poori Excel report — naam, roll no, stream, year, mobile, address.
        👨‍🏫 Faculty Report
        Sabhi faculty members ki Excel report — naam, subject, designation, qualification, experience, email.
        📋 Admission Report
        Admission records aur category-wise merit list ke liye alag se poora dedicated tool banaya gaya hai (Samarth Excel import, PWD/SC/ST/OBC/EWS/General category-wise merit, duplicate detection) — wahi is category ki detailed reporting bhi deta hai.
        Site par 5 jagah running ticker chalte hain. Har ek alag se edit karein — ek line = ek message. Hindi aur English dono bharein (English khaali chhodne par Hindi hi dikhega).
        🔴 Header — Live Notices (Hindi)
        🔴 Header — Live Notices (English)
        ✅ Ticker update ho gaya!

        📌 Upcoming Events Ticker (English)

        ⏰ Deadline Ticker (English)
        ✅ Deadline ticker update ho gaya!

        🆕 New Forms Ticker (English)

        ✅ Verified / Accreditation Ticker (Hindi)
        ✅ Verified / Accreditation Ticker (English)
        ✅ Verified ticker update ho gaya!
        🇮🇳 Special Occasion Banner (Independence/Republic Day)
        Tiranga flag + Vande Mataram audio card — homepage ke sabse upar dikhega jab ON ho. Sirf khaas mauko par ON karein (15 Aug, 26 Jan), baaki time OFF rakhein.
        Banner Show karein
        🎬 Banner Type — Photo, Video ya Dono
        Video ya Dono chuna hai to neeche YouTube link daalein (jaise: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XXXXXXXXXXX)
        Pura gaana lamba ho to yahan bata do kitne second se kitne second tak chalna hai (jaise 0 se 35 tak) — sirf wahi hissa play hoga.
        START (seconds)
        END (seconds)
        ✅ Banner type save ho gaya!

        🖼️ College Photo (About College page — top center)
        Ye photo "About The College" page mein College Introduction ke upar center mein dikhegi.
        📤 Tap karke College Photo select karein
        ✅ College Photo saved!
        👨‍🏫 Teaching Posts Sanctioned (Subject-wise)

        ✅ College Ranking updated!
        📝 Site Text Editor
        Yahan website ke saare static headings, labels aur bilingual (Hindi/English) text milenge. Search karke dhoondo, edit karke Save dabao — turant website pe reflect ho jayega. "Reset" se wapas original text aa jayega.
        ✅ Text updated!

        🌐 Discipline Gallery Website पर दिखाएं
        📸 Discipline Photos (एक-एक फोटो हर discipline के लिए)

        🏆
        🏅 Sports Results — सभी Disciplines (Male & Female · 1st/2nd/3rd)
        हर discipline में Male aur Female — दोनों के 1st, 2nd, 3rd position वाले 3-3 slots (कुल 6) हैं। नाम भरते ही Class/Sem auto-fetch होगा (अगर student पहले से registered है) aur Certificate button apne aap enable ho jaayega।
